ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vendors" (
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor */,
  "vendor_name" TEXT /* Name of the taxi vendor */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the vendor */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the vendor */,
  "registered_date" TEXT /* Date when the vendor was registered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the vendor (e.g., active, suspended, terminated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "borough" TEXT /* Borough where the location is situated */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_types" (
  "payment_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment type */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method (e.g., Credit Card, Cash) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment method */,
  "is_cashless" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the payment method is cashless */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rate_codes" (
  "ratecode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rate code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rate code */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the rate code became effective */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the rate code is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ratecode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., city official, taxi operator) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the trip data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the trip data was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the trip data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
